---
title: "Hello World"
description: "Subtitle, lots of characters"
author:
  - name: Lauren Price
    url: https://pricele2.github.io/
    # affiliation: R-Ladies Santa Barbara
    # affiliation-url: https://www.meetup.com/rladies-santa-barbara/
date: 05-21-2026
categories: [Quarto, R, R-Ladies, Community]
citation:
  url: https://pricele2.github.io/blog/hello-world/
image: positconf2022-selfie.jpg  # lives inside your post’s subdirectory
draft: false
---

Here is where I will start writing my actual blog post content...
